title: Golden Mountains
writer: Lev Arnshtam, Aleksei Chapygin, Andrey Mikhaylovsky
actors: Boris Poslavsky, Yuri Korvin-Krukovsky, Boris Feodosyev
plot: Soviet proletarian film about anti-war strike at St Petersburg factory, 1914. Resembles Pudovkin's classic "End of St. Petersburg," made 4 years earlier: backward lad (Poslavsky) from poor village comes to town desperate for work....
